name: Product hero on natural surface (clean / minimal)
description: Stacked or single jars on wood slice / stone with eucalyptus, beige cream background. Bold black headline, side-stack price.

name: Lid-off whipped texture macro
description: Real photo of single jar with whipped texture visible at top. White text overlay. EANZ badge bottom-left. Garden backdrop.
notes: Used in 'We're sorry' static — flagship combo with retail-pullout copy.

name: Limited edition split-scene composite
description: Two jars side by side, background split between sunset and night-with-crescent-moon. Bold display headline.

name: Tropical / lifestyle ingredient flatlay
description: Tallow jar surrounded by ingredient props (mango, vanilla pods, etc.). Warm orange-yellow lighting.

name: Bullet-annotated product hero
description: Three jars stacked, mint/cream background, lines pointing to feature callouts. Designed-feel.
notes: Buy 2 Jars V1 visual ships with 20,000+ Kiwis stat — outdated, needs update.

name: Clean product pedestal (deal variant)
description: Three different scent jars on white pedestal with palm leaf and beige background.
vibe: minimal premium, no number stat (sidesteps customer-count inconsistency)

name: Premium dark hero (Reviana signature)
description: Magazine-quality black-and-gold composition. Reviana jar on dark moody background, rays of light, reflection at base, gold lettering. Caption tagline overlay.

name: Cinematic / heroic landscape
description: Single tallow jar on mountain peak silhouette with city lights at sunset. Dramatic.

name: Founder talking-head video thumbnail
description: Curtis or staff outdoors, casual, holding/gesturing toward product. Play button overlay. Real environment.

name: POV character + website composite
description: Customer character photo overlaid on PrimalPantry website screenshot. 'POV: …' overlay caption. Lo-fi.

name: Social-proof screenshot collage
description: Three Scalp Shampoo bars in front of leafy plants. 4 actual customer review messages stacked overhead.

name: Hand-holding-product (garden/organic)
description: Hand from frame holding the Reviana jar in front of greenery. Video play button overlay.

name: UGC unboxing in fulfilment space
description: Young person in actual warehouse/fulfilment area holding up a jar. Video format.

name: Inventory tile / abundance shot
description: Tiled stacks of branded product boxes with one open jar in centre. Video format.

name: Problem-question text overlay on clean product
description: Single product on textured beige surface. Bold headline overlay framing prospect's pain as a question.
vibe: clean editorial, leads with the problem

name: Comparison / villain split
description: Side-by-side. Left: PrimalCare jar with '98% Tallow / 2% Oils' callouts. Right: 'Big Name moisturiser' tube with damning callouts.

name: Christchurch hometown landmark backdrop
description: Tallow jar (lid off) on stone foreground with Christchurch Cathedral in soft-focus background. Snow/winter atmosphere.

name: Multi-product carousel (themed colour per scent)
description: Carousel format — each card a different product on a colour-themed editorial background.

name: Product launch poster (deal header)
description: Twin pump bottles centre-stage, 'Product Launch Deal: 20% Off [Bundle]' red bold headline, 'New Product' starburst.

name: Premium dark hero with text-tagline overlay (Reviana Eye Cream signature)
description: V7 family with bold serif tagline overlay above the jar. Eye Cream Brightening (gold/black) on grey gradient.

name: Picture-in-picture video (reaction format)
description: Two stacked frames — small inset top-right (creator/influencer reveal), larger main frame of person reacting.

name: Premium DTC e-commerce poster (Reviana Tallow Serum signature)
description: REVIANA dropper bottle in dramatic forest-light scene. Full poster lock-up: header, display headline, subhead, icon trust pills, strikethrough price + CTA pill.

name: Texture / usage demonstration (finger-in-jar) — RANGE WORKHORSE
description: Finger reaching into open jar pulling product out. Used across the entire range. Most reused visual treatment in the library.
notes: Production note: shoot on a tonal background that matches the product's label colour.

name: Lifestyle beauty model (sunlit, daisies, palm)
description: Lifestyle photo of woman holding Reviana jar to her eye, daisies in foreground, blurred palm leaves. Sun-kissed warm tones.
notes: Tagline 'Fresh. De-puffed. Cucumber-cool.' lifted from customer quote in Type G.

name: Editorial testimonial collage
description: Designed lifestyle composition titled 'What others are saying' with customer quote block, side icon list of benefits, product hero, tagline lock-up.

name: Duo product hero with finger-in-jar (cross-sell variant)
description: Two jars side by side. Background jar (closed) sits behind a foreground jar (lid off) with V23 finger-in-jar treatment.
